name: Investigate
short_description: This game is a classic puzzle game where players can select their preferred difficulty level at the beginning.
detailed_description: This game is a classic puzzle game where players can select their preferred difficulty level at the beginning. By using the mouse to drag and place blocks on the screen, the goal is to arrange them in the correct order and position until they form a complete picture. Each puzzle is thoughtfully designed to ensure that players can appreciate the beauty of art while enjoying the game. A slight click sound is played when a block is placed correctly, adding a sense of accomplishment to the gameplay. The game features a clean and user-friendly interface with a light and pleasant background melody, making it perfect for relaxing and improving logical thinking skills. Whether you're a puzzle enthusiast or a first-time player, you'll find your own joy in this game.
